title: TurboQuant KV Cache Compression | 6x Memory, 8x Speed
subtitle: Google Research cuts LLM KV cache memory 6x and attention speed 8x at 3 bits per value with zero accuracy loss, no retraining.
content_html:
Google Research TurboQuant cuts LLM KV cache memory 6x and attention speed 8x at 3 bits per value with zero accuracy loss and no retraining required.

How TurboQuant Works

TurboQuant combines two techniques: PolarQuant uses polar coordinate quantization to efficiently compress key vectors, while QJL (Quantized Johnson-Lindenstrauss) handles value vectors. The result is a training-free, calibration-free compression method that works on any LLM.

Impact on LLM Inference

A 70B parameter model that requires 40GB of VRAM for a 100K token context window drops to roughly 7GB with TurboQuant compression, enabling deployment on smaller GPU clusters.

metadata.title: TurboQuant KV Cache Compression | 6x Memory, 8x Speed
metadata.description: Google Research TurboQuant cuts LLM KV cache memory 6x and attention speed 8x at 3 bits per value with zero accuracy loss, no retraining. PolarQuant plus QJL.
